name: Counterparty 2 identifier type indicator
description: Counterparty 2 identifier type indicator is reported as a boolean True/False value, where True indicates that Counterparty 2 is reported as an LEI.
optionalityRules: Required for all transaction reports (ALL Action types)
valueRules: True indicates that Counterparty 2 is reported as an LEI.

citations.document_name: ASIC Derivative Transaction Rules (Reporting) 2024—Schedule 1 technical guidance
